routes.title: AgentForge4j — Governed AI Workflows for Java
routes.description: AgentForge4j is an open-source Java framework for Java teams building their own governed AI workflows, with approvals, tools, and observability.

@graph.name: AgentForge4j
@graph.description: AgentForge4j is an open-source Java framework for Java teams building their own governed AI workflows, with approvals, tools, and observability.

@graph.name: AgentForge4j
@graph.description: An embeddable Java framework for governed AI workflows.

routes.title: API Reference — AgentForge4j
routes.description: Generated Javadoc for the AgentForge4j framework. Browse the latest stable or next (development) API reference.

routes.title: Get Started — AgentForge4j
routes.description: Embed AgentForge4j in your own Java application — no server to install, no account to create. The bundled fake provider runs offline, no credentials needed.

routes.title: Workflow Catalogue — AgentForge4j
routes.description: Browse the shipped, ready-to-run workflows published in the AgentForge4j Workflow Catalog.

routes.title: Workflow Builder — AgentForge4j
routes.description: Visually import, edit, and export AgentForge4j workflow definitions in the browser.

routes.title: Architecture — AgentForge4j
routes.description: AgentForge4j is a set of layered Java modules — the core has no dependency on any specific LLM provider, with providers, tools, and configuration loading built as separate layers on top.

routes.title: Releases — AgentForge4j
routes.description: AgentForge4j 0.1.0, the first public framework release, is published to Maven Central. Framework, shipped workflow catalog, and workflow builder are versioned independently.

routes.title: Community & Contributing — AgentForge4j
routes.description: AgentForge4j is open source and welcomes contributions — bug reports, documentation improvements, and code.

routes.title: Contributing — AgentForge4j
routes.description: AgentForge4j is open source and welcomes contributions — bug reports, documentation improvements, and code.

routes.title: Security — AgentForge4j
routes.description: How to report a security vulnerability in AgentForge4j, and the framework's default tool-policy and outbound-egress protections.

routes.title: Legal — AgentForge4j
routes.description: Licence, privacy, accessibility, and trademark information for AgentForge4j and this website.

routes.title: Contact — AgentForge4j
routes.description: Contact addresses for AgentForge4j security reports, administration, and general enquiries.
